summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Automate Accounts e-store. Backend API functionality fully working. Frontend user flows and admin features operational with minor UI overlay issue.

critical_bugs.issue: IndentationError in server.py lines 1622-1625 - incomplete function code after 'if customer:' statement
critical_bugs.impact: Backend service was failing to start - 520 errors
critical_bugs.status: FIXED - Added missing code block and cleaned up orphaned lines

ui_bugs.issue: Modal dialog overlay preventing click on sync tab in admin panel
ui_bugs.status: Modal overlay blocks tab navigation - needs modal close handling

integration_issues.issue: Some products don't show add to cart button (expected for inquiry/external products)
integration_issues.status: Expected behavior - inquiry and external products use different buttons

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate - 21/21 tests passed)
User signup with required fields and mocked verification code return
Product detail page navigation and display
Calculator pricing updates (Scope & Pay Later option working)
Admin control panel with all tabs (customers, orders, subscriptions, catalog)
Professional UI design with proper branding and layout
